subject: File organizer not working on network drives
description: When I point the file organizer at a mapped network drive (Z:\shared), it hangs indefinitely. Works fine on local drives. Windows 11 Pro.

subject: How to export competitor analysis as PDF?
description: Can I export the Blue Ocean canvas as a PDF? I need to include it in a client presentation.

subject: APP KEEPS CRASHING
description: Every time I try to check a large Excel file (200MB+) the entire app freezes and then crashes. This has happened 5 times now. I need this fixed ASAP or I want a refund.

subject: OpenClaw gateway won't start
description: Getting 'gateway already running (pid 12345); lock timeout after 5000ms' error. Tried restarting WSL but same issue. Using Ubuntu 24.04 on Windows 11.

subject: What is WSL and why do I need it?
description: I downloaded Secretary Bird but it says I need WSL and Ubuntu. I don't know what those are. Can you make this simpler? I'm not a developer.

subject: CSV with 500k rows - supported?
description: Is there a row limit for the data processor? I have a 500k row CSV and want to know before I try loading it.

subject: Dark theme is too dark
description: The dark theme background is almost pure black. Could you add a lighter dark theme option? Something like Discord's dark mode would be perfect.

subject: Can Secretary Bird connect to our SQL Server?
description: We have an on-prem SQL Server 2019. The database integration page says 'coming soon'. When will this be available? We'd license 20 seats if it supports our stack.

subject: Just saying thanks!
description: No issue here. Just wanted to say your app is great and has made my work so much easier. Keep it up!

subject: Security audit - data handling questions
description: Our security team needs to know: 1) Where is user data stored? 2) Is anything sent to external servers? 3) Do you have SOC 2 compliance? 4) Can the app run fully offline? We cannot proceed with procurement without answers.
